entities.name: Human-centric scaling
entities.context: Organizational phase marked by deliberate investment in specialized human capital, contrasted with 'hacking' phase

entities.name: Hacking phase
entities.context: Early startup phase focused on building product with lean technical teams, characterized by technical risk

entities.name: Operational maturity
entities.context: Company state signaled by willingness to pay for specialized human capital procurement

entities.name: Institutionalization
entities.context: Strategic shift from product-building to organization-building

entities.name: Recruiter hiring
entities.context: High-fidelity signal and leading indicator of company's transition out of pure hacking phase

entities.name: Series A phase
entities.context: Scale-up phase characterized by shift from technical risk to execution and cultural risk

entities.name: Technical risk
entities.context: Primary risk during hacking phase when bottleneck is building the product

entities.name: Execution risk
entities.context: Risk type that emerges when bottleneck shifts to building the organization

entities.name: Cultural risk
entities.context: Risk type alongside execution risk in scale-up phase

entities.name: AI-augmented landscape
entities.context: Current environment where AI allows companies to maintain lean high-output teams longer

relationships.context: Sequential transition marked by recruiter hiring
Serves as high-fidelity signal of maturity
Represents hallmark transition to traditional scale-up
Company bottleneck shifts from building product to building organization
Risk profile evolves during organizational maturation
AI enables longer maintenance of lean technical teams, extending hacking phase
